kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Kīlauea volcano is erupting. Episode 48 at the summit of Kīlauea in Halemaʻumaʻu started at 4:40 a.m. HST on June 1. Variable ash and tephra fall reported around the summit region.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
